title: Food
description: Vocabulary related to food, cooking and eating.

entries.definition: A set of instructions for preparing a dish.
entries.example: My grandmother gave me her favourite cake recipe.

entries.definition: To cook food in an oven.
entries.example: She baked a chocolate cake yesterday.

entries.definition: Recently made, picked or prepared.
entries.example: The market sells fresh vegetables every morning.

entries.definition: Having a strong hot flavour from spices.
entries.example: The curry was too spicy for me.

entries.definition: One of the foods used to make a dish.
entries.example: The main ingredient in bread is flour.

entries.definition: Having a very pleasant taste.
entries.example: The soup was absolutely delicious.

entries.definition: To give food to someone at a meal.
entries.example: Dinner is served at seven o'clock.

entries.definition: Wanting or needing food.
entries.example: I am hungry after this long walk.

entries.definition: Good for your body and well-being.
entries.example: Fruit is a healthy snack.

entries.definition: To have a particular flavour.
entries.example: This pasta tastes amazing.

entries.definition: An occasion when people eat food.
entries.example: Breakfast is an important meal.

entries.definition: A list of food and drinks available in a restaurant.
entries.example: Can I see the menu, please?

entries.definition: To ask for food or drink in a restaurant or café.
entries.example: I ordered tea and a sandwich in the café.

entries.definition: To cook something in very hot water.
entries.example: Boil the potatoes for fifteen minutes.

entries.definition: A thin flat piece of food.
entries.example: Would you like a slice of cake?

entries.definition: The particular taste of food or drink.
entries.example: This cheese has a strong flavour.

entries.definition: A small amount of food eaten between meals.
entries.example: I had a quick snack before class.

entries.definition: An amount of food served to one person.
entries.example: The restaurant served a large portion of chips.

entries.definition: Food that remains after a meal.
entries.example: We ate the leftovers for lunch the next day.

entries.definition: The feeling of wanting to eat.
entries.example: The long walk gave me a big appetite.
